positive: A stylized, vibrant depiction of a crescent moon viewed through a bioluminescent forest canopy at night. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring intricate line work inspired by Art Nouveau and cosmic celestial patterns. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. The moon is rendered with sharp, crystalline details, surrounded by glowing, stylized flora and fauna silhouettes (e.g., glowing moths, ethereal ferns). The artwork must have clean, crisp lines, high contrast, and an isolated feel, making it perfect for direct application onto apparel. Ideal for repeat pattern or single-focus central graphic. --style vector illustration, tattoo art, clean lines, mythic, cosmic --ar 1:1
negative: photorealism, blurry, watermark, text, signature, logo, low contrast, artifacts, bad anatomy, messy lines, jpeg artifacts, noisy, ugly, distracting elements
